title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 226.770 - Authority to contract with public agencies for funds
text:
226.770.  Authority to contract with public agencies for funds. — The state highways and transportation commission is authorized to enter into any necessary agreements with the Secretary of Commerce or other public agency necessary to obtaining of available funds for the purposes described in Title 23, Sections 136 and 319, of the United States Code, as revised in 1965.
(L. 1965 2d Ex. Sess. p. 907 § 3, A.L. 2018 S.B. 881)
